name: oriel-v2-preview
description: PREVIEW — the Koyeb-hosted Agent Board v2 at https://mcp.ori3l.com/v2/ (off Supabase, flat-rate), for dual-run dogfooding alongside the live v1 oriel plugin. Registers the agent-board-v2 MCP server (same tools, v2 backend). Auth: set ORIEL_BOARD_ABK in your environment to your abk_ key (the v2 backend resolves it → board-mint). Install next to oriel to compare v1 vs v2.
